name: daily-invoice-scan
prompt: Scan workspace/invoices/ for any new unprocessed PDF files. Extract GST data from each file, log results to workspace/logs/activity.log, and move processed files to workspace/invoices/processed/. Report how many files were processed and any flags found.

name: gstr1-compilation
prompt: Today is the 11th. Compile GSTR-1 for the previous month using compile_gstr1. Write B2B, B2C, and HSN summary CSVs to workspace/outputs/. Log completion to workspace/logs/activity.log.

name: gstr3b-summary
prompt: Today is the 18th. Generate GSTR-3B summary for the previous month using generate_gstr3b. Compute tax liability, ITC available, and net payable. Write JSON report to workspace/outputs/. Log to activity.log.

name: monthly-pl-report
prompt: Generate monthly P&L report for the previous month using generate_pl_report. Write CSV and JSON to workspace/outputs/. Log to activity.log.

name: mismatch-audit
prompt: Run generate_mismatch_report for this month. Check for tax rate mismatches, missing GSTINs, blocked ITC, and suspected duplicates. Write report to workspace/outputs/. If any critical flags found, prepend URGENT to the log entry.
